title: Josh's More Foods
description: Adds a lot of new food, including teas, rice, new variants of bread, pies, and a lot more - a total of over 60 new recipes!
body:
![Josh's More Foods](https://github.com/Joshcraft2002/joshs-more-foods/blob/main/media/coverart.png?raw=true) # Introduction Josh's More Foods simply adds a lot of new food items you can craft, as well as a new crafting station to make some of them. # Cookbook The cookbook is your in-game guide to all recipes and information about the datapack. Craft it with Bread and a Book and Quill. ![Josh's More Foods](https://github.com/Joshcraft2002/joshs-more-foods/blob/main/media/cookbook.png?raw=true) # Features Cooking Station - A new crafting station that lets you cook many of the new foods Knives - Knives are new tools/weapons that swing faster than swords but do weak damage. These will be used soon in some recipes. Rice - A new ingredient derived from wheat seeds that can be used in place of wheat or in other unique recipes. Tea - Derived from tea leaves, these herbal/floral drinks give a small regenerative effect when consumed. A Bunch of New Food - 2 Rice Meals - 13 Teas - 5 Breads - 3 Cookies - 7 Pies - 3 Doughnuts - 5 Salads - 4 Ice Cream - and a few other foods Book of Nutrition - Shows the nutrition value of all the new foods. Crafted with a Carrot and Book and Quill > To obtain any item via command, run `/loot give @s loot jmmf:/` # Installing Download the resource pack and place it in your resourcepacks folder, and download the data pack and place it in your world or server's datapacks folder. > Using the Download button at the top won't give you the resource pack file. Please go to the versions tab and select the download from there.
Visual Guide ![Version Select](https://github.com/Joshcraft2002/joshs-more-foods/blob/main/media/versionselect.png?raw=true) ![Pack Location](https://github.com/Joshcraft2002/joshs-more-foods/blob/main/media/packslocation.png?raw=true)
If you plan to use multiple datapacks and resourcepacks together, you can use [weld](https://weld.smithed.dev/) to easily merge them together. This may also help with compatibility issues between packs. >Some packs may not be compatible with others even with weld, but Josh's More Foods follows smithed's conventions for better integration with other packs # Credits Sprites are made by [Bonii](https://twitter.com/ChalkDev), me, RenTheMan, Sirenity, VidiTerraNovum Language Contributions: - German (de_de) by [LimeSculkCraft7](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/limesculkcraft7/) - Spanish (es_es) by [ElGeroIngles](https://github.com/ElGeroIngles) - French (fr_fr) by [patapon888](https://github.com/patapon888) - (up to 1.20.4) Brazilian Portuguese (pt_br) by [MeiaQuatru](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/meiaquatru/) - Polish (pl_pl) by [malpkakefirek](https://github.com/malpkakefirek) - Russian (ru_ru) by [Ll66dar](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/ll66dar/) - Thai (th_th) by [PBMINE](https://github.com/PBMINE) - Ukrainian (uk_ua) by [MrBaget](https://modrinth.com/user/MrBaget) - Vietnamese (vi_vn) by Haisenberger - Simplified Chinese (zh_cn) by [Rain_G](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/rain_g/) & their team - Traditional Chinese (Taiwan) (zh_tw) by [KoukeNeko](https://github.com/KoukeNeko) This datapack uses adaptations of the Smithed Custom Block and Custom Crafter libraries, both under the MIT License. [License](https://github.com/Joshcraft2002/joshs-more-foods/blob/main/LICENSE-smithed) ## Contributing
Translations If you want to help with translations, you can message me on discord (joshmats) or PlanetMinecraft, or submit a pull request.

You can base off of the US English file here

For the cookbook, the text may not fit the pages very well. Tweak your phrasing and use of newlines (\n) to better fit the text, though I can handle further text formatting if needed. Either way, it would be good to coordinate via messages/discord in case of any issues.
